name_en: ❤️B brand pure original latest drawstring bucket bag 🍀 Made of cotton twill fabric, no lining design, lightweight texture, featuring smooth calfskin trim. Equipped with an adjustable leather shoulder strap for switching between shoulder and crossbody styles at will. A classic piece from Bur, interpreting wardrobe essentials with a distinct brand style. Dimensions: 27.5x 16x 29cm
